channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Qatari PM and US officials discuss strategic ties amid Iran war
item.description: The meeting reviewed the 'close strategic cooperation' between Doha and Washington, Qatar's foreign ministry said.

item.title: Iran expert says US ground invasion could cause a global economic meltdown
item.description: Ali Vaez says the US and Iran have reached a stalemate where further escalation would likely lead to catastrophe.

item.title: Ukraine announces ‘mutually beneficial’ defence deal with Saudi Arabia
item.description: Kyiv, which has built expertise on how to counter drones, seals pact amid Iran war.

item.title: Yemenis fear economic consequences of being dragged into US-Iran conflict
item.description: Iran-allied Houthis yet to get involved in conflict, but could target shipping in Red Sea.

item.title: What is LNG and what is it used for?
item.description: Natural gas powers a quarter of the world, and almost a fifth of LNG moves through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UN rights chief urges US to conclude probe into deadly Iran school attack
item.description: Human Rights Council calls for investigation and hears devastating testimony from grieving mother Mohaddeseh Fallahat.

item.title: Wildlife killed, reefs damaged in ‘active’ Gulf of Mexico oil spill
item.description: Authorities say the oil is seeping from three sources, including a vessel that has not yet been identified.

item.title: India lowers fuel taxes, says rumours of lockdown ‘completely false’
item.description: India, the world's third biggest crude importer, announces measures amid shortages created by the Iran war.

item.title: War on Iran price crisis not just about energy, says analyst
item.description: Abdulla Banndar Al-Etaibi, says the disruption of fertiliser supplies due to the war on Iran will push food prices up.

item.title: Video: Children’s toys found in rubble of US-Israeli strike in Iran
item.description: Rescue teams from the IRCS have been searching the rubble of residential buildings hit in US-Israeli attacks on Iran.
